channel.title: gramantin/awesome-rails Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: gramantin/awesome-rails May 17th, 2021
item.description:
Resources

Books

  • Agile Web Development with Rails 6
  • Docker for Rails Developers
  • Rails 5 Test Prescriptions
  • Rails, Angular, Postgres, and Bootstrap, Second Edition
  • Growing Rails Applications in Practice
  • Crafting Rails 4 Applications
  • The Rails 6 Way

    • Resources

    Video tutorials

  • RailsCasts *(inactive since 2013)
  • GoRails *(freemium)
  • Drifting Ruby *(freemium)

    • Resources

    Youtube channels

  • Gorails
  • TechmakerTV

    Community

  • Gorails forum

    • Resources

  • From Rails scaffold listing to Hotwire infinite scroll
  • Building a Component Library in Rails With Storybook
  • How to Speed Up Load Times In A Rails App - What I Wish I Knew Four Months Ago
  • Endless Scroll / Infinite Loading with Turbo Streams & Stimulus

item.title: gramantin/awesome-rails Mar 17th, 2021
item.description:
Resources

Jobs

  • Stack Overflow

    • Resources

    Articles

  • More than "Hello World" in Docker: Build Rails + Sidekiq web apps in Docker

    • Open Source Rails Apps

  • airCastingstars53 - A platform for recording, mapping, and sharing health and environmental data using your smartphone (using Rails 5.2). - 🌍
  • alavetelistars328 - A platform for making public freedom of information requests - using Rails 5.1 - 🌍
  • api.rssstars345 - A RSS feed conversion (to API) app (using Rails 5.2).
  • asakusaSatellitestars101 - A realtime chat application for developers (using Rails 6.0). - 🌍
  • autolabstars642 - A course management app (using Rails 4.2). - 🌍
  • campostars448 - A forum app (using Rails 4.2). - 🌍
  • catarsestars1.6k - A crowdfunding platform for creative projects (using Rails 4.2). - 🌍
  • commudlestars241 - A community management app (using Rails 5.2).
  • crabgrass-core - A collaboration platform for activist groups (using Rails 4.2).
  • dgidbstars85 - A drug gene interaction platform - using Rails 5.1
  • eol - An encyclopedia app - using Rails 3.2 - 🌍
  • foremstars19.7k - Social platform app specialized for web development (using Rails 5.2). - 🌍
  • growstuffstars380 - A data management app for food gardeners (using Rails 5.2). - 🌍
  • hackersharestars381 - Social bookmarks website for hackers (using Rails 6.0). - 🌍
  • hitobitostars278 - An event organization app (using Rails 4.2). - 🌍
  • inaturaliststars516 - A community app for nature and related stuff (using Rails 4.2). - 🌍
  • kanbanstars637 - A Trello clone (using Rails 4.2).
  • mastodonstars30.1k - A microblogging app (using Rails 5.2). - 🌍
  • openstreetmap-websitestars1.6k - A map viewing app (using Rails 6.0). - 🌍
  • opensourcefridaystars1.1k - A project contribution tracking app (using Rails 6.0). - 🌍
  • otwarchivestars957 - A social networking app for fans - using Rails 5.1 - 🌍
  • peatiostars3.6k - A crypto currency exchange app (using Rails 4.0).
  • planningalerts-appstars76 - A planned applications tracking app (using Rails 5.2). - 🌍
  • reservationsstars132 - An inventory management app (using Rails 6.0). - 🌍
  • rletters - A frontend for database of journal articles for researchers (using Rails 6.0). - 🌍
  • sanatarostars52 - An account tracker (using Rails 4.2).
  • tracksstars1.1k - A goal tracking app (using Rails 5.2). - 🌍
  • vgliststars128 - A video game library tracking web app (using Rails 6.0). - 🌍

item.title: gramantin/awesome-rails Feb 25th, 2021
item.description:
Gems

  • railsstars51.6k - A full-stack web development framework 🔴

item.title: gramantin/awesome-rails Feb 24th, 2021
item.description:
Starters/Boilerplates

  • default_rails_templatestars27 - Default template for generating new Rails applications.
  • docker-Rails-Templatestars127 - A freshly updated version of "rails new", preconfigured to be run with Docker.
  • docker-railsstars1k
  • jumpstart(excid3)stars1k - Easily jumpstart a new Rails application with a bunch of great features by default.
  • jumpstart(thomasvanholder)stars19 - Template for set-up of Rails 6, Tailwind 2.0 and Devise.
  • kickoff_tailwindstars418 - A rapid Rails 6 application template for personal use bundled with Tailwind CSS.
  • rails-devise-graphqlstars276 - A Rails 6 boilerplate to create your next Saas product. Preloaded with graphQL, devise, JWT, CanCanCan, RailsAdmin, Rubocop, Rspec, and more.
  • rails-template(mattbrictson)stars931 - Application template for Rails 6 projects; preloaded with best practices for TDD, security, deployment, and developer productivity.
  • rails-template(TristanToye)stars30 - MVP Ready Rails - A Template for Your Next Rails App
  • rails-template(ackama)stars100 - Application template for Rails 6.1 projects; preloaded with best practices for TDD, security, deployment, and developer productivity.
  • rails-template(astrocket)stars72 - Template for Rails 6.0 + Kubernetes + Webpacker + Stimulus + TailwindCSS + Let's Encrypt.
  • rails-template(dao42)stars380 - A best & newest & fastest rails 6.x template for senior rails developer.
  • rails-templates(lewagon)stars562 - Jump start your Rails development with Le Wagon best practices.
  • rails-templates(nimblehq)stars64 - Our optimized Rails templates used in our projects.
  • rails-vue-templatestars22 - An example of how to use VueJS as a single page application inside Rails using Webpacker.
  • suspendersstars3.8k - A Rails template with our standard defaults, ready to deploy to Heroku.
  • vuejs-rails-starterkitstars219 - Vue.js + Rails Starting Kit GitHub Template to develop Hybrid Mobile Application.

item.title: gramantin/awesome-rails Feb 22nd, 2021
item.description:
Resources

Official Resources

  • Rails Official Website
  • Rails Official Guide
  • Rails Official Guide (Edge Guide)
  • Rails API Documentation
  • Rails Source Codestars51.6k
  • Rails Official Blog

    • Resources

    Articles

  • I created the same application with Rails and no JavaScript

    • Open Source Rails Apps

  • activeWorkflowstars615 - An intelligent process and workflow automation platform based on software agents (using Rails 5.2).
  • adopt-a-hydrantstars612 - A civic infrastructure detection app (using Rails 4.2).
  • askawaystars33 - Question & answer app specialized in politics (using Rails 4.1).
  • beatstreamstars124 - A music streaming app - using Rails 3.2
  • bike_indexstars239 - A bike registry tracking app (using Rails 4.2). - 🌍
  • blackCandystars896 - A music streaming app (using Rails 6.0).
  • brimirstars1.4k - An email helpdesk app (using Rails 5.2). (archived).
  • calagatorstars407 - A community calendaring app (using Rails 4.2).
  • canvas-lmsstars4.5k - A learning management app (using Rails 5.2).
  • chatwootstars13.8k - A simple and elegant live chat software (using Rails 6.0).
  • ciaostars1.5k - A URL status checking app (using Rails 6.0).
  • coRMstars28 - A customer relationship management app - using Rails 3.2 - 🌍
  • coderwall (legacy)stars863 - A social network app for software engineers - using Rails 3.2
  • coderwall (next)stars198 - A social network app for software engineers - using Rails 5.0
  • codetriagestars1.3k - An open source project finder app (using Rails 6.0). - 🌍
  • contribulatorstars88 - An open source project finder app - using Rails 5.1
  • coursemology2stars117 - Learning platform app (using Rails 5.2).
  • covoiturage-librestars112 - A carpooling app - using Rails 5.0 (archived).
  • crowdAIstars144 - An app for data science challenges (using Rails 5.2). - 🌍
  • crowdtiltOpenstars592 - A crowdfunding platform - using Rails 3.2
  • cw-ovpstars18 - video packaging to *.m3u8 for HLS (HTTP Live Streaming) with FFMPEG on website (using Rails 6.0).
  • danboorustars1.6k - A taggable image board app (using Rails 6.0).
  • dcaf_case_managementstars82 - A case management app (using Rails 5.2).
  • diaperstars300 - An inventory management app for diaper banks (using Rails 6.0). - 🌍
  • diasporastars13.1k - A social networking app - using Rails 5.1 - 🌍
  • discoursestars36.6k - A platform for community discussion (using Rails 6.0). - 🌍
  • ekylibrestars294 - A farm management app (using Rails 4.2).
  • postalstars12.1k - A mail delivery platform (using Rails 5.2).
  • encrypt.tostars130 - A messaging app with encryption support (using Rails 4.2).
  • expertizastars175 - A learning material sharing app (using Rails 4.2).
  • fairmondostars108 - A marketplace app (using Rails 4.2). - 🌍
  • fat-free-crmstars3.4k - An open source, Ruby on Rails customer relationship management platform (CRM) (using Rails 5.2). - 🌍
  • feedbinstars3k - A RSS reader app (using Rails 6.0). - 🌍
  • follow-allstars83 - A Twitter account management app (using Rails 4.2). (archived).
  • fromthepagestars151 - A wiki-like app for crowdsourcing transcription of handwritten documents (using Rails 4.1). - 🌍
  • gitlabhqstars23k - A code collaboration app (using Rails 6.0).
  • graff_magsstars19 - A graffiti magazine sharing app (using Rails 4.1). - 🌍
  • hashrobotstars46 - A social media management app (using Rails 4.2). - 🌍
  • helpystars2.2k - A customer support app (using Rails 4.2). - 🌍
  • hoursstars1k - A time tracking app (using Rails 4.2). - 🌍
  • intercityup.comstars111 - A control panel app for app deployment (using Rails 4.1).
  • kitsu-toolsstars2.1k - An anime discovery platform (using Rails 4.1).
  • lavishstars692 - A color scheme generator (using Rails 4.2).
  • lifeToRemindstars8 - A career planning app (using Rails 5.2).
  • lobstersstars3.4k - A link aggregation app (using Rails 5.2). - 🌍
  • loomiostars2.1k - A collaborative decision-making app (using Rails 5.2). - 🌍
  • obtvse2stars263 - A blogging app (using Rails 4.0).
  • onebodystars1.4k - A social networking app for churches - using Rails 5.1
  • openFarmstars900 - A database for information about farming and gardening (using Rails 5.2). -
  • opencongressstars49 - A website for getting information about US Congress - using Rails 3.0 (archived).
  • openprojectstars6.1k - A project management app (using Rails 6.0). - 🌍
  • passwordPusherstars833 - A password delivery app (using Rails 4.2). - 🌍
  • popHealthstars126 - A population health reporting app (using Rails 4.1).
  • publifystars1.8k - A blogging app (using Rails 5.2).
  • quantstars140 - A personal health tracker (using Rails 4.1).
  • racing_on_railsstars40 - A bike racing organization app (using Rails 5.2).
  • rapidFTRstars284 - An information provider app for aid workers (using Rails 4.0).
  • redminestars2.5k - A project management app (using Rails 5.2). - 🌍
  • rentmybikes-railsstars58 - A marketplace app - (using Rails 4.0).
  • scholarspherestars7 - A digital assets management app - using Rails 5.1
  • selfstarterstars3.2k - A crowdfunding app (using Rails 4.0).
  • sharetribestars2.2k - A peer-to-peer marketplace platform (using Rails 5.2). - 🌍
  • socifystars372 - A social networking platform - using Rails 5.0
  • splits-iostars122 - A speedrun data store and analysis engine. (using Rails 6.0). - 🌍
  • spokenvotestars42 - A social voting app (using Rails 4.2).
  • stackneveroverflowstars166 - A question asking & answering platform - using Rails 5.0
  • teamboxstars1.9k - A collaboration app - using Rails 3.0 - 🌍 (archived).
  • theodinprojectstars2.1k - A teaching & learning platform (using Rails 5.2). - 🌍
  • tradostars153 - An e-commerce platform (using Rails 4.2).
  • websiteOnestars138 - A project tracking app (using Rails 5.2). - 🌍
  • whitehallstars769 - A content management app used by UK government - using Rails 5.1

    • Other Rails Tools

    DevTools

  • Opticstars1k - Optic automatically documents and tests your APIs.

item.title: gramantin/awesome-rails Feb 13th, 2021
item.description:
Resources

Articles

  • Design Patterns with Ruby on Rails part 1: Introduction and Policy Object - Part 2
  • The Progressive Rails App
  • Modern Rails flash messages (part 1): ViewComponent, Stimulus & Tailwind CSS - Part 2
  • Building a Rails App With Multiple Subdomains
  • Reactive Rails applications with StimulusReflex
  • 1 Backend, 5 Frontends - Todo List with Rails, React, Angular, Vue, Svelte, and jQuery
  • Create a Video Party App With Rails Part 1: Building the Backend - Part 2
  • The Rails Model Introduction I Wish I Had
  • How to create a gem in Ruby on Rails? -From Scratch-
  • Multiple Foreign Keys for the Same Relationship in Rails 6
  • QR Code Reader on Rails
  • Magic Links with Ruby On Rails and Devise
  • Instantly speed up your Rails application by self-hosting your fonts
  • Reactive Map with Rails, Stimulus Reflex and Mapbox
  • A Future for Rails: StimulusReflex
  • Introduction to Ruby on Rails Patterns and Anti-patterns Part 1 - Part 2
  • Rails Concerns: To Concern Or Not To Concern
  • Building an Event Sourcing System in Rails, Part 1: What is Event Sourcing? - Part 2
  • Real Time Notification System with Sidekiq, Redis and Devise in Rails 6
  • Deploying Your Rails 6 App
